title: More Than Routing: Joint GPS and Route Modeling for Refine Trajectory Representation Learning

method.name: JGRM (Joint GPS and Route Modeling)
components: Two encoders (route and GPS trajectory encoders)
Shared transformer for inter-modal information interaction
method.approach: Fuses GPS trajectory and route information through inter-modal information interaction

validation.performance: Outperforms existing methods in both road segment representation and trajectory representation tasks

methodology_evolution: Sequential models for specific downstream tasks
Route trajectory-based methods with NLP techniques (Word2Vec, BERT)
Graph neural networks for spatial relationships
Two-step methods combining spatial and temporal modeling
